WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
DNC 01.
1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 16 FEB
   BY M/V HAIYANGSHIYOU 720 TOWING TEN 12000
   METER LONG CABLES IN AREA BOUND BY
   26-39S 042-28W, 27-32S 044-09W,
   27-34S 044-08W, 26-42S 042-28W.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 342/19.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 17 FEB 19.
